items.title: Deep Learning (Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville)
items.author: Ian Goodfellow, Yoshua Bengio, Aaron Courville
items.note: Chapter on feedforward networks covers tanh, sigmoid, and ReLU activations, saturation, and vanishing gradients.

items.title: PyTorch Tanh documentation
items.author: PyTorch Developers
items.note: API reference for torch.tanh and nn.Tanh with numerically stable implementation.

items.title: TensorFlow tanh activation
items.author: TensorFlow Developers
items.note: Framework tanh op used in RNN/LSTM modules and custom layers.

items.title: Learning representations by back-propagating errors (Nature, 1986)
items.author: Rumelhart, Hinton, Williams
items.note: Seminal backpropagation paper establishing sigmoid/tanh hidden units in multilayer networks.
